title: 2026 World Economic Forum with Elon Musk on AI Development | Video | C-SPAN.org
text:
Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk spoke with BlackRock CEO Larry Fink at the 2026 World Economic Forum (WEF) in Davos, Switzerland. Musk shared his vision for the future, which included humanoid robots, self-driving cars, solar-powered artificial intelligence satellites, reusable spacecraft capable of intergalactic travel, and plans to reach Mars within his lifetime. This was Musk's first appearance at the WEF after criticizing the forum in the past.
2026 World Economic Forum with Elon Musk on AI Development | Video | C-SPAN.org

Clipping Instructions
---------------------

There are three ways to set in and out points for a clip:

* Slide the yellow markers on the progress bar to your desired points
* Enter the times in the "Start Time" or "End Time" text boxes
* Find your point and click "Set start/end at video time" under the "Start Time" or "End Time" text boxes

Check your selection with the "Preview Clip" option

If satisfied,

* Enter the title and description of the clip
* Click "Save Clip"

If you are editing the times of an existing clip, you may only set a start and end time within the original clip boundaries
